tasks.label: inspect-export-disk-usage
args: cd /d c:\GitHub\openkotor-discord-bots && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$drive=Get-PSDrive C; Write-Output ('FREE_BYTES=' + [int64]$drive.Free); Get-ChildItem exports -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -in @('nameplate-validation','reaction-emoji-validation','display-name-style-validation') } | Select-Object Name,@{Name='SizeBytes';Expression={(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum}} | Format-Table -HideTableHeaders | Out-String"

tasks.label: inspect-export-disk-usage-pwsh
args: $drive = Get-PSDrive C; Write-Output ('FREE_BYTES=' + [int64]$drive.Free); Get-ChildItem 'c:\GitHub\openkotor-discord-bots\exports' -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -in @('nameplate-validation','reaction-emoji-validation','display-name-style-validation') } | Select-Object Name,@{Name='SizeBytes';Expression={(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum}} | Format-Table -HideTableHeaders | Out-String

tasks.label: inspect-export-disk-usage-pwsh-simple
args: $drive = Get-PSDrive C; Write-Output ("FREE_BYTES=$([int64]$drive.Free)"); foreach ($name in @("nameplate-validation","reaction-emoji-validation","display-name-style-validation")) { $path = Join-Path "c:\GitHub\openkotor-discord-bots\exports" $name; if (Test-Path $path) { $size = (Get-ChildItem $path -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum; Write-Output ("$name|$size") } }

tasks.label: cleanup-validation-exports
args: cd /d c:\GitHub\openkotor-discord-bots && if exist exports\nameplate-validation rmdir /s /q exports\nameplate-validation && if exist exports\reaction-emoji-validation rmdir /s /q exports\reaction-emoji-validation && if exist exports\display-name-style-validation rmdir /s /q exports\display-name-style-validation
